sections.heading: 1. Overview
sections.content: This Custom GPT integrates with an external Cloudflare Worker using ChatGPT Actions to provide enhanced functionality. This privacy policy explains what data may be transmitted, how it is used, and your privacy rights.

sections.heading: 2. Data Processed by the Custom GPT
sections.content: The Custom GPT processes user-provided prompts in real-time. These prompts may include text that you voluntarily enter. This information is used only to generate responses and fulfill the requested functionality.

sections.heading: 3. Data Sent to the Cloudflare Worker
sections.content: When certain features are used, the Custom GPT may send specific parameters from your prompt to the Cloudflare Worker via a ChatGPT Action. These requests are transient and are used only to complete the function being requested.

sections.heading: 4. Data Not Permanently Stored
sections.content: Neither the Custom GPT nor the Cloudflare Worker permanently store user data. Requests are processed in memory and discarded after completion. No databases or persistent logs are maintained by us.

sections.heading: 5. No Personal Information Required
sections.content: You are not required to provide personal information such as names, email addresses, or account credentials to use this Custom GPT. We do not request, collect, or retain personally identifiable information.

sections.heading: 6. Cloudflare Operational Logging
sections.content: Cloudflare may automatically log basic operational metadata such as IP address, request path, and user agent for security and performance purposes. These logs are controlled by Cloudflare and are governed by Cloudflare's own privacy policy.

sections.heading: 7. Data Sharing and Selling
sections.content: We do not sell, share, or transfer user data to third parties for advertising, marketing, or analytics.

sections.heading: 8. User Rights
sections.content: Because no persistent personal data is stored, there is no need for account deletion, export, or correction procedures. If you believe information was sent that you did not intend to share, you can stop using the Custom GPT at any time.

sections.heading: 9. External Links and Integrations
sections.content: Responses generated by this Custom GPT may contain links to external websites. We are not responsible for the content or privacy practices of external sites.

sections.heading: 10. Updates to This Policy
sections.content: We may update this privacy policy to reflect new features or legal requirements. Changes will be reflected with an updated date.

sections.heading: 11. Contact
sections.content: For questions about this privacy policy or how data is handled, please contact us using the email below.
